backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores contact form inquiries in a Set, with functions to submit, retrieve, and delete inquiries, including a custom comparator for the Inquiry record type.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the email address update feature to the Footer and Contact page files, with associated test ID REQ-9.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key content for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title and description to 'Insight Research and Communications' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that configures TanStack Router with routes for home, services, service detail, research methodologies, research types, market analysis, and contact pages inside a shared Layout.
Two-column layout component displaying a market analysis category with a text/item list on one side and a visual geo-dots panel with icon on the other, supporting reversed layout.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Controlled contact form with validation for name, email, company, and message fields, submitting to the backend via a mutation hook and showing a success confirmation state on completion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the InsightRC brand, contact details including email 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com', phone, and Bangalore address, plus organized navigation link columns and copyright.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component for the landing page displaying a headline, subtext, CTA buttons linking to services and contact pages, and key stats with icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer around child components.
Card component displaying a research methodology (qualitative or quantitative) with a title, description, and a grid of named methods, styled differently based on type.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-link highlighting, and links to the main site sections.
frontend/src/components/ResearchTypeCard: Card component displaying a numbered research type with an icon, description, and a bullet list of key points.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Clickable card component linking to a service detail page, showing an icon, title, description, and optional tags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitContactForm mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitContactForm method and invalidates the inquiries query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a dark navy + gold OKLCH color palette with custom utility classes for gradients, patterns, and hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying company contact info (email, phone, location, response time) alongside a ContactForm component, with a styled header section.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a Hero component, a grid of six featured service cards, a 'Why Choose Us' checklist section, and links to other pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/pages/MarketAnalysis.tsx: Market Analysis page rendering alternating AnalysisSections for market trends, customer analysis, and competitive landscape, plus a capabilities grid and a CTA link.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchMethodologies: Research Methodologies page displaying two MethodologyCards (qualitative and quantitative) with their respective method lists, an intro paragraph, and a CTA section.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchTypes.tsx: Research Types page rendering six numbered ResearchTypeCard components covering Primary, Secondary, Qualitative, Quantitative, Descriptive, and Exploratory research with key points for each.
frontend/src/pages/ServiceDetail.tsx: Defines a detailed service page component that renders per-service content (benefits, process steps, deliverables) using a static data map keyed by service ID, with navigation via TanStack Router params.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Renders the Services listing page with a header and a responsive grid of ServiceCard components, one for each of the six market research service offerings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy and gold color palettes, display/body font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 7) for the Insight Research and Communications website, listing existing features, contact details, and architectural metadata for build planning.
